title: Offer of Chains
storyPurpose: Seris broadcasts: king lost control; Meridian offers protection; citizens panic.

panels.description: Sky projection / conduit broadcast of Seris Vale addressing the kingdom.

bubbles.text: Tempestria — your king has lost control. Meridian offers orderly protection.
bubbles.speaker: Seris Vale

panels.description: Village panic: people running under torn banners; children toward shelters.

King Vaelor Tempest the Storm King: tall ancient armored monarch, storm-worn cloak, silver-and-cyan crown, lightning scars, Rift crystal in gauntlet, one eye glowing storm-cyan, weathered proud face, storm blade enraged on balcony; Mira and Cael arguing for clarity over blame.

bubbles.text: We came for a signal — not a seizure.
bubbles.speaker: Mira Eggwarden

dialogue.text: Tempestria — your king has lost control. Meridian offers orderly protection.
dialogue.speaker: Seris Vale

dialogue.text: We came for a signal — not a seizure.
dialogue.speaker: Mira Eggwarden

grokPrompt: Original high-energy Western fantasy comic storytelling with dynamic panel composition, dramatic inked linework, richly painted colors, expressive character acting, and clear cinematic action. Original Riftwilds IP only. Slate stone, silver metal, moss and timber first; electric cyan crystal, white lightning, deep indigo storm clouds, gold royal accents as accents only. NO purple AI-fantasy neon default. NO Marvel/DC/Pokémon characters or logos. Riftwilds comic "The Storm King" Issue #5, STORY PAGE 14/25 — Offer of Chains. Story purpose: Seris broadcasts: king lost control; Meridian offers protection; citizens panic. Layout: three-stack. 3 panels with clear inked gutters. Panel 1 (p14a): Sky projection / conduit broadcast of Seris Vale addressing the kingdom. Panel 2 (p14b): Village panic: people running under torn banners; children toward shelters. Panel 3 (p14c): King Vaelor Tempest the Storm King: tall ancient armored monarch, storm-worn cloak, silver-and-cyan crown, lightning scars, Rift crystal in gauntlet, one eye glowing storm-cyan, weathered proud face, storm blade enraged on balcony; Mira and Cael arguing for clarity over blame. Characters: mira-eggwarden, vaelor-tempest, seris-vale, cael-vesper. Creatures: spark. Spark design lock: Spark the Glowpup-line Riftborn hatchling: soft luminous fur, cyan-gold rift markings, large expressive eyes, small crystal growths, glowing-tip emotional tail, steadier aura when bonded; cute but original — not a franchise mascot. Keeper lock: Mira Eggwarden: young adult Hatchery mentor/Keeper, warm brown skin, dark hair in practical braid, travel-stained hatchery coat over Compact robes, Compact lantern charm on satchel, determined protective eyes. Storm King lock: King Vaelor Tempest the Storm King: tall ancient armored monarch, storm-worn cloak, silver-and-cyan crown, lightning scars, Rift crystal in gauntlet, one eye glowing storm-cyan, weathered proud face, storm blade. Thundervane lock: Thundervane: massive winged storm-lion companion, dark storm fur and feathered wings, electric-cyan markings, white-hot eyes, lightning along spine, royal armor fragments, visible exhaustion. Environment: Tempestria Storm Kingdom. Time: day. Weather: permanent supernatural storm. Lighting: slate peaks with electric cyan lightning. Continuity: {"location": "citadel balcony / village", "public": "panic", "vaelor": "blames-outsiders"} Leave empty balloon-safe and narration-safe negative space in upper/lower panel corners. NO readable text of any kind in the artwork.
negativePrompt: readable dialogue text, captions, logos, watermarks, page numbers, UI chrome, Marvel, DC, Pokémon, manga screentone trademarks, extra limbs, duplicate characters, missing companions, purple neon fantasy default, photoreal modern clothing, Pikachu lookalike, Cal Reed, Voltkit
letteringInstructions: Standard speech + narration; keep tails off faces and Spark's eyes; king speech formal/controlled.
artAlt: Offer of Chains — The Storm King page 14
transcript: SPEECH (Seris Vale): Tempestria — your king has lost control. Meridian offers orderly protection.
SPEECH (Villager B): Protection or a new cage?
SHOUT (King Vaelor Tempest): You came with them!
SPEECH (Mira Eggwarden): We came for a signal — not a seizure.
